tasks.title: Fix asset path prefix in Blade templates (remove ./public/ from asset() calls)
tasks.description: Removed redundant public/ prefix from all asset() calls. Fixed 147 occurrences across 59 files (57 Blade templates + 2 PHP files). Removed public/public symlink workaround.

tasks.title: Fix PHP 8.4 nullable parameter deprecations in app/ code
tasks.description: Added explicit ?Type nullable syntax to all typed parameters defaulting to null. Fixed 19 parameters across 12 PHP files in app/.

tasks.title: Fix Vue 'component' not defined in wizard Company.vue
tasks.description: Vue warn: Property or method 'component' is not defined on the instance but referenced during render in resources/assets/js/views/wizard/Company.vue. Causes wizard page to render blank.

tasks.title: Fix serviceworker.js and manifest.json 500 errors
tasks.description: PWA routes for serviceworker.js and manifest.json return 500 errors. Not critical for local development but shows errors in browser console.
